summary: Industry-Specific Dashboard Widgets feature fully tested. All 3 widget types (PhotographyWidgets, FineArtWidgets, DesignWidgets) render correctly based on user's primaryIndustry. Backend: 5/5 API tests passed. Frontend: All widget features verified.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/auth/me returns user with primaryIndustry field
Backend: GET /api/leads/stats returns statusCounts for widget phase displays
Backend: GET /api/leads returns leads array for project lists
Backend: GET /api/bookings with date range params for upcoming shoots
Backend: GET /api/leads/:leadId/quotes accessible for quotes data
Frontend: WEB_DESIGN primaryIndustry renders DesignWidgets with data-testid='design-widgets'
Frontend: DesignWidgets shows 'Projects by Phase' with colored progress bar (violet, purple, fuchsia, blue, emerald)
Frontend: DesignWidgets shows phase counts (Brief, Discovery, Proposal, Revisions, Delivered)
Frontend: DesignWidgets shows 'Awaiting Action' panel with Pending Proposals, In Revisions, Delivered counts
Frontend: DesignWidgets 'New Project' link opens AddLeadModal
Frontend: PHOTOGRAPHY primaryIndustry renders PhotographyWidgets with data-testid='photography-widgets'
Frontend: PhotographyWidgets shows 'Upcoming Shoots' with booking cards (date/time visible)
Frontend: PhotographyWidgets shows 'Active Projects' list with status badges
Frontend: PhotographyWidgets 'Calendar' link navigates to calendar view
Frontend: Clicking active project opens LeadDetailModal
Frontend: FINE_ART primaryIndustry renders FineArtWidgets with data-testid='fineart-widgets'
Frontend: FineArtWidgets shows 'Active Commissions' grid with project cards
Frontend: FineArtWidgets shows 'Pipeline' with status counts and '6 pending quotes' indicator
Frontend: FineArtWidgets 'New Commission' link opens AddLeadModal
Frontend: Only one widget type renders at a time (correct conditional rendering)
Frontend: Widgets are responsive - single column on mobile, multi-column on desktop
Frontend: Status badge colors use violet-centric palette (violet, purple, fuchsia, indigo, blue, emerald, slate)
Frontend: Dashboard still shows stats cards and Kanban below the widgets
critical_code_review_comments: IndustryWidgets.tsx properly exports 3 named components: PhotographyWidgets, FineArtWidgets, DesignWidgets
Dashboard.tsx correctly conditionally renders widgets based on user?.primaryIndustry
GRAPHIC_DESIGN, WEB_DESIGN, BRANDING, ILLUSTRATION all render DesignWidgets as expected
Widget components use proper data-testids for testing
API calls in widgets use bookingsApi.getAll, leadsApi.getAll, leadsApi.getStats correctly
Loading states handled with LoadingDots component
Empty states handled with EmptyWidget component

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all widget features verified across all 3 industry types)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing leads and bookings
context_for_next_testing_agent: Industry Widgets feature complete. Key data-testids: design-widgets, photography-widgets, fineart-widgets, design-project-{id}, active-project-{id}, upcoming-shoot-{id}, commission-{id}. User primaryIndustry can be changed via Prisma to test different widgets. The 404 errors in console are from cover image URLs that don't exist - not a bug, just missing data.

sections: Awaiting Action (Pending Proposals, In Revisions, Delivered)

actions: Calendar link navigates to calendar view

responsive_layout.desktop: grid-cols-2 or grid-cols-3 depending on widget type
